sections.heading: How to Use This Benchmark
sections.body:
The primary goal for these pages is to significantly
reduce friction for your first vector test at scale (>10M vectors)
when evaluating performance for MongoDB Vector Search.

These pages provide a set of initial configurations (embedding model
dimensionality, quantization regime, `numCandidates` selection, filtering
criteria, Search Node configuration) that you can use to run tests confidently.
You might need to modify your configuration based on the dataset and query
patterns relevant to your use case, as this is only meant to be a starting point.

sections.heading: Reading Recommendations
sections.body:
When reading these pages, we recommend that you focus on the primary concern
that is most relevant to your use case. We provide guidance for the following
primary concerns: **Recall**, **Cost**, and **Latency/Throughput**.

Use the guidance that is most appropriate for your use case:

**Recall:**

Recall

Read these sections in the following order:

- The following sections in the [Benchmark Overview](avs-benchmark-overview):

  - [Quantization](avs-benchmark-quantization)

  - [Dimensionality](avs-benchmark-dimensionality)

  - [Search Node Configuration](avs-benchmark-search-node-config)

- The following sections in the [Benchmark Results](avs-benchmark-results):

  - [Summary of Results](avs-benchmark-results-summary)

  - [Multidimensional Benchmark](avs-multi-dimensional-benchmark)

  - [Larger Benchmark](avs-multi-larger-benchmark)

  - [Recall and Latency Analysis](avs-recall-latency-analysis)

  - [Filtering](avs-benchmark-results-filtering)

- [Additional Performance Recommendations](avs-performance-recommendations)

**Cost:**

Cost

Read these sections in the following order:

- The following sections in the [Benchmark Overview](avs-benchmark-overview):

  - [Quantization](avs-benchmark-quantization)

  - [Dimensionality](avs-benchmark-dimensionality)

  - [Search Node Configuration](avs-benchmark-search-node-config)

- The following sections in the [Benchmark Results](avs-benchmark-results):

  - [Summary of Results](avs-benchmark-results-summary)

  - [Multidimensional Benchmark](avs-multi-dimensional-benchmark)

  - [Larger Benchmark](avs-multi-larger-benchmark)

  - [Recall and Latency Analysis](avs-recall-latency-analysis)

  - [Concurrency](avs-benchmark-results-concurrency)

- [Additional Performance Recommendations](avs-performance-recommendations)

**Latency:**

Latency/Throughput

Read these sections in the following order:

- Complete [Benchmark Overview](avs-benchmark-overview)

- Complete [Benchmark Results](avs-benchmark-results)

- [Additional Performance Recommendations](avs-performance-recommendations)

sections.heading: Changelog
sections.body:
| Date       | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| ---------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2025-07-21 | Release of benchmark guide and results demonstrating how MongoDB Vector Search scales on a 5.5M Multidimensional and 15.3M 2048d Amazon Dataset with Voyage AI's voyage-3-large embeddings under various conditions. |
